Starters.name: Tostones con Mojo
Starters.description: Crispy twice-fried green plantain slices served with our signature garlic-citrus mojo sauce

Starters.name: Ceviche Tropical
Starters.description: Fresh shrimp marinated in lime juice with mango, cucumber, red onion, cilantro and jalapeño

Starters.name: Empanadas Tropicales
Starters.description: Golden-baked pastries stuffed with seasoned beef picadillo, olives and raisins — served with chimichurri

Starters.name: Yuca Frita
Starters.description: Crispy fried cassava sticks with roasted garlic aioli and a squeeze of fresh lime

Starters.name: Queso Fundido
Starters.description: Melted Oaxacan cheese with roasted poblano peppers and chorizo, served with warm tortillas

Salads.name: Ensalada Tropicana
Salads.description: Mixed greens, mango slices, toasted coconut, avocado and red onion with passion fruit vinaigrette

Salads.name: Papaya & Avocado Salad
Salads.description: Ripe papaya, creamy avocado, arugula, pepitas and cotija cheese with lime-honey dressing

Salads.name: Chayote Slaw
Salads.description: Shredded chayote squash, carrot and cabbage tossed in a tangy citrus dressing with fresh herbs

Main Dishes.name: Ropa Vieja
Main Dishes.description: Slow-braised shredded beef in sofrito tomato sauce with bell peppers, olives and capers — served with rice and black beans

Main Dishes.name: Pollo al Mojo
Main Dishes.description: Whole roasted half-chicken marinated in citrus mojo with garlic, oregano and cumin — with rice and maduros

Main Dishes.name: Camarones al Coco
Main Dishes.description: Jumbo shrimp in a creamy coconut milk sauce with pineapple and roasted peppers over arroz blanco

Main Dishes.name: Puerco Asado
Main Dishes.description: Slow-roasted mojo-marinated pork shoulder, fork-tender, served with yuca con mojo and congri

Main Dishes.name: Pescado Tropical
Main Dishes.description: Fresh grilled mahi-mahi with mango salsa, coconut rice and sautéed tropical vegetables

Main Dishes.name: Bandeja Paisa
Main Dishes.description: Traditional Colombian mixed platter: red beans, white rice, ground beef, chicharron, egg, avocado and plantain

Sides.name: Arroz con Frijoles Negros
Sides.description: Cuban black beans slowly simmered with sofrito over fluffy white rice

Sides.name: Maduros
Sides.description: Caramelized sweet plantains, golden and tender

Sides.name: Yuca con Mojo
Sides.description: Boiled cassava drizzled with warm garlic-citrus mojo sauce

Sides.name: Congri
Sides.description: Rice cooked together with black beans, garlic and cumin — a Cuban staple

Desserts.name: Tres Leches Cake
Desserts.description: Sponge cake soaked in three milks, topped with fresh whipped cream and tropical fruit

Desserts.name: Flan Cubano
Desserts.description: Classic silky Cuban custard with a golden caramel sauce — grandma's original recipe

Desserts.name: Churros con Chocolate
Desserts.description: Crispy cinnamon-sugar churros served with thick dark chocolate dipping sauce

Desserts.name: Arroz con Leche
Desserts.description: Creamy rice pudding infused with cinnamon and lemon zest, dusted with nutmeg

Drinks.name: Mojito Clásico
Drinks.description: Havana Club rum, fresh mint, lime juice, sugar and sparkling water

Drinks.name: Piña Colada Tropical
Drinks.description: Coconut rum blended with fresh pineapple, coconut cream and a splash of passion fruit

Drinks.name: Cuba Libre
Drinks.description: Premium rum, Mexican Coca-Cola and fresh lime — the classic

Drinks.name: Agua de Jamaica
Drinks.description: House-made hibiscus flower tea, lightly sweetened and served over ice

Drinks.name: Jugo Tropical
Drinks.description: Freshly blended seasonal tropical fruit juice — mango, guava, papaya or tamarind

Drinks.name: Sangria Tropical
Drinks.description: Red wine with tropical fruits, rum and fresh citrus — served by the glass or pitcher
